creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, Mar 01, 2008 at 10:54:06AM +1100, Mark Picone wrote:
> mx1.freebsd.org makes my emails disappear sometimes.
> 
> ---------- Forwarded message ----------
> From: Mark Picone <mark@markpicone.com.au>
> Date: Sat, Mar 1, 2008 at 10:52 AM
> Subject: [Fwd: Re: ports/120831: security/tripwire: Tripwire fails to make
> keys when compiled with -O2 (default) from ports]
> To: markjpicone@gmail.com
> 
> I have only had this problem on i386 hardware. This worked fine on SPARC64
> with -O2 and AMD64 now as well it seems.
> 
> "make install clean" is all that needs to be done, it gets stuck on key
> generation which is done as part of the install process as far as i know.
> 
> - Mark Picone

I just tried this on a 6.2 VM (i386) and was unable to reproduce it.  Is
there any chance you can get a ktrace of the process so I can see what
it's doing?

-- WXS
